title: pentacalia jelskii
intro: Pentacalia jelskii, also known as the Jelsk's Pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Peru and Ecuador. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pentacalia jelskii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, with herbal preparations often taking the form of infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers.
